fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

`SKWebpEncoderFrame` is a struct that represents a single frame in an animated WebP image. Each frame pairs pixel data (stored as an <xref:SkiaSharp.SKPixmap>) with a display duration. Create frames from <xref:SkiaSharp.SKBitmap>, <xref:SkiaSharp.SKImage>, or <xref:SkiaSharp.SKPixmap> sources and pass them to <xref:SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoder.EncodeAnimated*> to build an animated WebP file.

## Examples

```csharp
var frames = new[]
{
    new SKWebpEncoderFrame(frame1Bitmap, TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(100)),
    new SKWebpEncoderFrame(frame2Bitmap, TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(100)),
    new SKWebpEncoderFrame(frame3Bitmap, TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(200))
};

var options = new SKWebpEncoderOptions(SKWebpEncoderCompression.Lossy, 80);
using var data = SKWebpEncoder.EncodeAnimated(frames, options);
File.WriteAllBytes("animation.webp", data.ToArray());
```
]]></format>
fields.summary: Represents a single frame in an animated WebP image, pairing pixel data with a display duration.

params.bitmap: The <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKBitmap" /> providing the pixel data for this frame.
params.duration: The duration this frame is displayed.

fields.summary: Initializes a new instance of <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderFrame" /> from a bitmap and a display duration.

params.image: The <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKImage" /> providing the pixel data for this frame.
params.duration: The duration this frame is displayed.

fields.summary: Initializes a new instance of <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderFrame" /> from an image and a display duration.

params.pixmap: The <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPixmap" /> providing the pixel data for this frame.
params.duration: The duration this frame is displayed.

fields.summary: Initializes a new instance of <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderFrame" /> from a pixmap and a display duration.

fields.value: The <see cref="T:System.TimeSpan" /> indicating how long this frame is displayed.
fields.summary: Gets or sets the duration this frame is displayed in the animation.

fields.value: The <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPixmap" /> containing the pixel data for this frame.
fields.summary: Gets or sets the pixel data for this frame.
